# PDTF 2.0 — Property Data Trust Framework

> The Property Data Trust Framework version 2.0 replaces OpenID Connect verified claims with W3C Verifiable Credentials, decomposes the monolithic property data schema into an entity graph, and introduces decentralised identifiers and cryptographic signing.

## Overview
- Website: https://property-data-standards-co.github.io/web/
- GitHub: https://github.com/property-data-standards-co
- Author: Ed Molyneux / Moverly

## Key Concepts
- Entity Graph: Transaction, Property, Title, Person, Organisation, Ownership, Representation, DelegatedConsent, Offer
- Credentials: W3C Verifiable Credentials v2.0 with DataIntegrityProof (eddsa-jcs-2022, Ed25519)
- Identity: did:key (persons), did:web (organisations, transactions), urn:pdtf:* (properties, titles, relationships)
- Trust: Trusted Issuer Registry (TIR) — git-hosted, entity:path authorisation
- Revocation: W3C Bitstring Status List v1.0
- Three trust phases: Moverly trusted proxies → hosted adapters → primary source root issuers

## Specifications
- [Architecture Overview](https://property-data-standards-co.github.io/web/specs/00-architecture-overview/)
- [Entity Graph](https://property-data-standards-co.github.io/web/specs/01-entity-graph/)
- [VC Data Model](https://property-data-standards-co.github.io/web/specs/02-vc-data-model/)
- [DID Methods](https://property-data-standards-co.github.io/web/specs/03-did-methods/)
- [Trusted Issuer Registry](https://property-data-standards-co.github.io/web/specs/04-trusted-issuer-registry/)
- [Key Management](https://property-data-standards-co.github.io/web/specs/06-key-management/)
- [State Assembly](https://property-data-standards-co.github.io/web/specs/07-state-assembly/)
- [Reference Implementations](https://property-data-standards-co.github.io/web/specs/13-reference-implementations/)
- [Credential Revocation](https://property-data-standards-co.github.io/web/specs/14-credential-revocation/)

## Implementation
- [@pdtf/core](https://github.com/property-data-standards-co/core) — signing, verification, DIDs, status lists, TIR client
- [Trusted Issuer Registry](https://github.com/property-data-standards-co/tir) — live registry data
- [Schemas](https://github.com/property-data-standards-co/schemas) — JSON Schemas

## Consensus Questions
17 open questions (Q1.1–Q6.3) requiring industry consensus, documented in the Architecture Overview §14.
